item.description:
# CodexMate 0.0.18
- Keep active Codex Desktop threads marked as running during thread list refreshes by reading the session file task state from `rollout_path`. - Preserve waiting-for-input and approval indicators from session files when the app-server thread row only reports metadata. - Added regression coverage for session-backed active task metadata so the notch sprite no longer flips between running and idle/unread while a turn is still active.
